status.description: confirmed = the finding still reproduces. fixed = the original reproduction no longer triggers (upstream fix applied between original scan and this run). inconclusive = could not run the reproduction; explain why in notes.

reproducer.description: The exact reproduction you ran, verbatim: the full script, command line, or input you executed against ./src — not a description of it. This is what makes the evidence interpretable; without it the output below is meaningless. Include the language/runner so the analyst can re-run it (e.g. the .rb/.py file contents, or the shell commands).

evidence.description: The output produced by running the reproducer above: stdout, stderr, exit code, failing assertion, diff of behaviour. Paste the relevant excerpts, not a summary.

notes.description: Short prose explaining what changed since the original scan, or why the reproduction was inconclusive.
